name: crop_farm
description: A 9x9 crop farm with water channel down the center for irrigation
comment: Farmland blocks require special handling: place dirt first, then till with hoe. Water at x=4 irrigates all farmland within 4 blocks.

layers.comment: Ground level — farmland rows with water channel at x=4. Place dirt then till for farmland. Dig hole and place water_bucket for water.
Air above farmland — crops are planted here after tilling, not part of block placement
